presets.name: Beginner
presets.description: Rapid verification of fundamental Python syntax.

topics.topic_name: Tier 1 - Data Structures & Manipulation (Lists, Sets, Strings)
Tier 1 - Logic & Flow Control (Conditionals, Loops, Comprehensions)
Tier 1 - Functions & Dictionaries (Nested lookups, signatures, defaults)
Tier 1 - Error Handling (Basic try-except, raising exceptions)
Tier 1 - Modules, Namespaces & Imports (Absolute/Relative, Circular imports)
Tier 1 - Basic File I/O & Context Managers (with open statements)

presets.name: Intermediate
presets.description: Everyday software engineering: OOP, iterators, and testing fundamentals.

topics.topic_name: Tier 1 - OOP Basics (Classes, Methods, Encapsulation)
Tier 1 - Functions & Dictionaries (Nested lookups, signatures, defaults)
Tier 1 - Data Structures & Manipulation (Lists, Sets, Strings)
Tier 1 - Built-in Iterators & Utilities (enumerate, zip, any, all)
Tier 1 - Basic File I/O & Context Managers (with open statements)
Tier 1 - Error Handling (Basic try-except, raising exceptions)
Tier 1 - Testing (unittest, pytest)

presets.name: Advanced
presets.description: Memory efficiency, strict typing, and deep language mechanics.

topics.topic_name: Tier 1 - OOP Basics (Classes, Methods, Encapsulation)
Tier 1 - Generators & Iterables (yield, generator expressions)
Tier 1 - Testing (unittest, pytest)
Tier 1 - Built-in Iterators & Utilities (enumerate, zip, any, all)
Tier 1 - Type Hinting & Annotations (Typing module, static analysis support)
Tier 1 - Logic & Flow Control (Conditionals, Loops, Comprehensions)
Tier 1 - Packaging and virtual environments (venv)
